lookalikes.prompt: A man in his early 50s, warm dark brown skin with subtle laugh lines, a square face with a strong, angular jawline. His hair is very short, salt-and-pepper gray, with a receding hairline. He has large, round, dark brown eyes set relatively close together under thick, straight gray eyebrows. His nose is narrow with a high bridge and a pointed tip. His lips are thin with a Cupid's bow, relaxed into a neutral expression. A neatly trimmed gray goatee and mustache frame his mouth. He stands at a bustling bar, holding a whiskey glass, head tilted slightly to the right, glancing off-camera, bathed in soft, warm ambient light. Medium full-body shot, face clearly visible. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A medium full-body shot of a man in his early 50s, standing at a busy bar, holding a glass. He has warm brown skin with subtle laugh lines. His facial shape is square, with a strong, angular jawline. His very short, closely cropped salt-and-pepper hair recedes slightly at the temples. His eyes are round and a vibrant blue, set under thick, straight gray eyebrows. His nose is narrow with a high bridge and a pointed tip. His lips are thin and straight, with a closed, neutral expression. A neatly trimmed gray goatee and mustache frame his mouth. He is looking directly at the viewer with a friendly, inviting gaze. Soft, warm lighting illuminates the scene. Photographic, sharp focus, realistic skin texture.

A three-quarter portrait of a man in his late 50s, standing in a busy bar, holding a glass. He has warm brown skin with some fine lines, a slightly more angular face, and high, prominent cheekbones. His hair is very short, closely cropped, and gray, with a receding hairline. His eyes are rounder and a deep brown, set slightly closer, under straighter, medium-thick gray eyebrows.
